channel.title: SamDoesArts :: Relearn Everything
channel.description: Summary yang di buat dari channel SamDoesArts

item.title: 10 EASY WAYS to Improve Your Art In 2026 (beginner friendly)
item.description: Summary from video of SamDoesArts with titled 10 EASY WAYS to Improve Your Art In 2026 (beginner friendly) Draw what scares you Draw something you always avoiding (your weakness) Fix your form Draw with proper hand grip (proper form) to reduce fatigue or injury later on Accept your imperfection Accept your drawing imperfection, you don’t have to post it. Just keep drawing and move on Finish your drawing Be responsible and finish your drawing It will make you discipline Just set the deadline and finish it on the timeframe Move on if you can’t finish it Draw More Drawing is like gacha with increase probability you can make it good every time you draw Don’t settle with shortcut or hack Keep a sketch book Sketchbook provide a space that encourage mistake Use it to have fun Set Goals Make sure you have control over the goals (you cannot control to get 100 likes in instagram) Make it quantifiable (like draw anatomy for 10 minutes everyday) Another example is like i want to make 3 finish pieces every month Study fundamentals Know the rules before you break them List of fundamental rules: Anatomy Value Color Perspective Use References The more you use refence the more mental library you will make Stop Listening to Everyone Listen to the the expert, some people like to share their skill but sometimes it will hurt your art journey habit Consume less and create more If you consume more than you create, then there is something wrong with your system Time is your most precious resource
